notes: v0.15.8 — Per-class skin storage (active_skin_per_class). MODULES blueprint ship reflects the VIEWING class. Ship is 20% bigger in-game + 2x in the cosmetics preview. Removed the halo bubble around the ship. Cosmetics preview clips its contents so bullets stop at the panel edge. Skin selection removed from CLASS tab — picked entirely in the dedicated COSMETICS page. PULSE skins are no longer called 'premium' (PREMIUM = SURGE-only). Windows only.
